title: Vanilla Extended Crossplay
description: A Vanilla Modpack for a extended Vanilla experience with your friends!
body:
##  🧱 Vanilla Extended Crossplay

Vanilla Extended – Crossplay Edition is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack that expands the classic vanilla experience while keeping its original charm intact. It’s designed for players who want more depth, variety, and modern features — without turning the game into something completely different.

### 🌍 Features

- Crossplay Support: Play together across Java and Bedrock editions!
- Performance Optimized: Smooth gameplay even on mid-range systems or servers.
- True Vanilla Feel: Every mod blends seamlessly into the base game’s style and balance.
- Enhanced Exploration: Discover new biomes, structures, and improved world generation.
- Quality of Life Improvements: Better UI, smarter mechanics, and refined progression – while staying close to vanilla gameplay.
- Server Friendly: Perfect for community servers or small friend groups who want a stable and consistent experience.
